name: Malina Joshi
profileSummary: Malina Joshi is a Nepalese actress and beauty pageant titleholder who won Miss Nepal 2011. She represented Nepal in Miss World 2011 which was held on 4 November 2011 in London. She was selected to perform Nepalese folk dance in the final day of the competition. She was also on the top-30 for Beauty with a Purpose title, a major award at Miss World.
